review_title: Great software, as long as you run windows. Worth it even it you dont.
description: Slow to open at times, and they pushed the AI stuff a bit hard, but it is a super reliable took that I come back to time and time again.
author: Zachary Adam S.
pros: Great and intuitive interface. Many options to configure things the way you like them. Good theme support
cons: Mac support is based on owning a crossover license or running in parallels instead of having an actual mac client. This leads to even more slowness in opening the app as compared to my windows running counterparts, and that is saying something as it takes several minutes to open for them from time to time.

description: Overall a pleasure to use, no big complaints. The version control was not intuitive (you have to push to the file, then push to git for instance), so a better "wizard" for getting new users through the process might be helpful. I would use this tool over MySQL workbench any day (less bugs, more features).
author: Christopher S.
pros: The db schema comparison toolset and the aliasing of the database instances in the server explorer. These were great, so is the versioning.
cons: The price is a little steep for a small company or a individual to purchase considering that the database layer is not typically the only thing a developer has to focus on, so pricing could be about 50% lower and you would probably have 10x the number of users.

review_title: Solid product for MariaDB and mySql development
description: We also use dbForge for Oracle. The MySql version has an interface that is very similar and works well with MariaDB. Overall, our developers are very happy with this product.
author: Patti K.
pros: I particularly like the schema/data comparison features of dbForge for MySql. The data comparison can be limited to specific table types or can exclude columns such as dates. The product is solid and consistent. We use it with a MariaDB and it now handles the package features reasonably well. Customer support was very good when this feature was being introduced and the standard version didn't handle it.
cons: Currently some issues with schema sync tool copying packages between schemas. To be fair, we haven't yet raised this as an issue. Previously experience indicates that we could expect a good response once raised.

description: dbForge Studio for MySQL remains a capable tool with a solid feature set, but it is held back by a lack of ongoing development and a frustrating support process. For users who rely on up-to-date compatibility and responsive issue handling, these drawbacks may outweigh the benefits.
author: Manuel A.
pros: Offers a comprehensive set of tools for MySQL database development and management. Intuitive user interface that's easy to navigate, even for less experienced users. Debugging store procedures
cons: The product has not received any substantial updates in years, making it feel stagnant. The bug reporting process is overly complex and invasive. The support team often requests an excessive amount of data—sometimes even requiring a near-complete copy of the database—which is impractical and raises privacy concerns. Additionally, the bug reporting process is unnecessarily tedious. The support team often requests excessive information, sometimes even asking for a near-complete copy of the database, which raises concerns about privacy and practicality. This makes it difficult to report issues efficiently and discourages users from contributing to product improvement.

review_title: SQL IDE that really improves productivity!
description: I've been using it for 4 years now, and will continue for sure! Migrating DB Schemas is easy and gets your job done faster that any other tool.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: It is fully featured with tools that you really need!The DB Comparison & Sync is the best I have used. The SQL parsing and debug works perfectly, helping to improve your code.No SQL IDE compares to dbforge!
cons: Some usability/UX issues, but nothing relevant, like the multi panel editor/viewer that sometimes makes it hard to read resultsets.

description: Very comperhensive and straightforward tool to administrate and use MySQL. I am very satisfied user of dbForge for MySQL studio.
author: Filip M.
pros: -schema comparison and data comparison tool - query builder - syntax highliter and syntax completition - schema and tabbbles administration
cons: - one feture has vanish during time I use this product - tab name of table that I query

description: It has over the years become a vital tool for the business.
author: Mark S.
pros: A powerful set of tools, all features laid out in a gogical fashion and easy to use
cons: I have not been disappointed at all by this product

author: Markus L.
pros: dbForge Studio for MySQL has been extremely helpful, especially when it comes to comparing schemas and data between two databases. Backup and restore tasks are also straightforward and easy to handle. The SQL Composer is a real time-saver and simplifies day-to-day work when creating SQL statements.
cons: Honestly not much to dislike. If anything, the UI can feel a bit busy at first, and it takes some time to discover all features.

review_title: dbForge Studio for MySQL is a robust tool.
description: All software has challenges. I commend the dbForge support team as akways being quickly responsive. They remain tenacious until the issue is fully resolved.
author: Steve H.
pros: Database creation, backup and restore all built in. The capability of simultaneously utilizing multiple database connections.
cons: Unable to use MySQL parameter standard of $(xxxxx). dbForge requires parameters be defined as :xxxxx. Need to be able to define parameter structure.

review_title: A good and helpful SQL programm and an useful alternative to microsoft
description: I use db forge Studio since 2018 and overall I´m happy with the product. Before I used the one from microsoft. With db forge it is much easier to organize the tables.
author: Sandra N.
pros: I really like the query builder and use it on a daily basis. It fastens my work a lot and make it much easier wo modify the statements.
cons: We often strugle with the update, because the format of the data changed with it quite often. For example: sometimes you have

review_title: Amazing auto-completion and keyboard shortcut customizability
author: Matthew M.
pros: I love the auto completions, especially for join statements and filling in column names. The customizability of the keyboard shortcuts is also very nice.
cons: My biggest pet peeve is the fact that it is not possible to disable auto-commit by default and at the connection level. Hence, I have had to put SET autocommit = 0; at the top of every script I use and execute it manually in every script window if I want autocommit to be off for transactions in that window.

author: Bram D.
pros: All the features are in a logical place. Very rich feature set.
cons: Some features don't work perfectly yet, like for example primary key identification in a view. Bugs are followed up quite well actually.

description: I have a large number (200 plus) databases that I manage and find DBForge an invaluable tool in my arenal.
author: Ryan P.
pros: I like the clean, understandable interface
cons: Nothing! Everyday I discover something cool about the software.

description: Very good
author: Mario B.
pros: Ability to manipulate very large databases and ability to compare databases to each other.
cons: La manière dont fonctionne l'éditeur de table n'est pas hyper user friendly, surtout en ce qui concerne la gstion des clés étrangères et le paramétrage des colonnes
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: I have been using it since 2012, and I’ve seen the software continuously improve while staying ahead of competing tools.
author: Julien H.
pros: Easy to get started with and extremely feature-rich. It has become an essential part of my daily workflow.
cons: The software can take a little time to start up, but once it’s running, it performs very quickly and efficiently, so this is not really an issue in daily use.

description: Mi piace e lo uso da diversi anni. Interfaccia semplice ma completa. Possibilità di lavorare su db diversi in modo semplice.
author: Dario Z.
pros: La possibilità di modificare i dati delle tabelle direttamente dalla selezione, è una cosa che in Toad non hai e mi ha felicemente sorpreso.
cons: Uso Toad da 20 anni, si deve confrontare con un ottimo prodotto. La possibilità di lavorare sulle tabelle in modo più semplice. Una duplicazione record non è cosi semplice.

description: "So far, everything has gone well. The installation and configuration were smooth, and the tool performs reliably for my daily database management tasks.
author: Francisco Levy S.
pros: dbForge MySQL Pro is an excellent tool for database administration. The AI Assistance feature greatly improves productivity, helping me create and optimize queries faster and with more precision.
cons: The price might be a bit high considering there are several free tools available that offer similar basic functionality.

review_title: Best mySQL query writer I know!
description: This is my go-to place to deeply manage my mySQL DBs and create queries! I have liked the very advanced features in the software.
author: Marco G.
pros: It has the best query writer I know to mySQL, very similar to Microsoft products. Great price, also liking the monthly price very well.
cons: Only connects to MySQL. I do wish that the other DBs that are similar had a similar price. I then would be able to have a single DB management solution.

review_title: DB Forge Mysql is a great product!
description: Enjoy the simplicity of the platform. The ease of access to my database and the ability to change the security rights.
author: David S.
pros: The ease of access to my database and the ability to change the security rights. Enjoy the simplicity of the platform.
cons: All is good. No issues. I have been using for many years and I like it! Would recommend to my colleagues as well.

review_title: Great Product at a Great Price
description: I have been using it for over 2 years and love the simplicity of this software. Anyone can jump right in and it is always being modified with new tools by dbForge.
author: Michael N.
pros: Easy to use and keep schemas in order and create complex queries.
cons: I would like code to show in different colors depending on the schema I am in. User chosen.

description: I have been using it for over three years, mainly for debugging complex stored procedures.
author: Sergey G.
pros: Excellent stored procedure debugger. Very convenient product
cons: Errors arise periodically, and we would like to receive corrections for them faster.

review_title: Life Saver Tool for DB Managers
description: It significantly reduces workload by saving thousands of hours in database schema merging, data management, and other related operations.
author: Anshul G.
pros: The schema, data comparison, and merge functionality are highly efficient and well-executed, providing excellent accuracy and seamless integration.
cons: I didn't find any in dbForge Studio for MySQL.

description: Very Good, it is my go too application for Database administration. It now runs seamslessly as background admin and interogation
author: Richard B.
pros: I find this a great alternative to phpmyadmin for MySql databases, the ability to setup automated scripts and compaire databases is brilliant.
cons: It was a bit tricky to get used to coming from a very simple phpmyadmin interface. But with a bit of perceverance got to grips with it.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: A good, reliable program. I like to use it.
author: Béla N.
pros: It's clear, easy to use. I found everything I needed in it.
cons: When I change the external HDD on my notebook, it doesn't recognize the license.

review_title: The best product on the market
author: Qemajl O.
pros: - Manu useful features - Code completion is one of the best feature I use in daily basis - Query Designer is a big advantage - Importing and Exporting datas is very easy
cons: Occasionally, I might get an "unexpected error" message.
